title: galeopsis angustifolia subsp. carpetana
intro: Galeopsis angustifolia subsp. carpetana is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, native to the Iberian Peninsula and Mediterranean regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis angustifolia subsp. carpetana can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
